tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators.
policies: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
24/7 customer support is available exclusively on the Pro plan.
Basic plan users can upgrade to Pro at any time; billing is prorated.
Annual billing offers 2 months free on both plans.
Free 7-day trial available for new users on the Pro plan.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn exports.

faq.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.answer: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes, new users get a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faq.question: What is AI captions?
faq.answer: AI captions automatically generates accurate subtitles and captions for your videos, supporting 20+ languages.
